data.name: UnexpectedServerError
data.value: Unexpected server error

data.name: UnexpectedErrorProcessingRequest
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while processing your request.

data.name: BadRequestTitle
data.value: Invalid request

data.name: UnauthorizedTitle
data.value: Authentication required

data.name: ForbiddenTitle
data.value: Access forbidden

data.name: NotFoundTitle
data.value: Resource not found

data.name: MethodNotAllowedTitle
data.value: Method not allowed

data.name: ConflictTitle
data.value: Resource conflict

data.name: UnsupportedMediaTypeTitle
data.value: Unsupported media type

data.name: BadGatewayTitle
data.value: Upstream service error

data.name: ServiceUnavailableTitle
data.value: Service unavailable

data.name: GatewayTimeoutTitle
data.value: Upstream service timeout

data.name: ValidationFailedTitle
data.value: Validation failed

data.name: ValidationFailedDetail
data.value: One or more validation errors occurred.

data.name: InvalidField
data.value: The value is invalid.

data.name: The {0} field is required.
data.value: The {0} field is required.

data.name: The field {0} must be between {1} and {2}.
data.value: The field {0} must be between {1} and {2}.

data.name: The {0} field is not a valid e-mail address.
data.value: The {0} field is not a valid e-mail address.

data.name: InvalidRequest
data.value: The request contains invalid values.

data.name: AuthenticationRequired
data.value: A valid bearer token is required to access this resource.

data.name: AccessForbidden
data.value: The authenticated user is not allowed to access this resource.

data.name: ResourceNotFound
data.value: The requested resource was not found.

data.name: MethodNotAllowed
data.value: The HTTP method is not allowed for this resource.

data.name: ResourceConflict
data.value: The request conflicts with the current resource state.

data.name: UnsupportedMediaType
data.value: The request content type is not supported.

data.name: InvalidOrganizationRequest
data.value: The organization request contains invalid values.

data.name: OrganizationContactEmailDuplicated
data.value: Organization contact email is already registered.

data.name: OrganizationTaxIdDuplicated
data.value: Organization tax identifier is already registered.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorCreatingOrganization
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while creating the organization.

data.name: InvalidOrganizationSignUpRequest
data.value: The organization sign-up request is invalid.

data.name: UserEmailDuplicated
data.value: User email is already registered.

data.name: InitialRoleNotFound
data.value: Initial sign-up role is missing.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorCreatingOrganizationSignUp
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while signing up the organization.

data.name: InvalidUserRequest
data.value: The user request is invalid.

data.name: OrganizationNotFound
data.value: Organization was not found.

data.name: UserNotFound
data.value: User was not found.

data.name: UserDeleteBlocked
data.value: User cannot be deleted because related records still depend on it.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorDeletingUser
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while deleting the user.

data.name: RoleNotFound
data.value: Role was not found.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorCreatingUser
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while creating the user.

data.name: UserPlanLimitExceeded
data.value: Current subscription plan does not allow creating another user

data.name: UnexpectedErrorAssigningUserRole
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while assigning the user role.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorGettingUsers
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while getting users.

data.name: InvalidLocationRequest
data.value: The location request is invalid.

data.name: LocationNameDuplicated
data.value: Location name already exists in this organization.

data.name: LocationNotFound
data.value: Location was not found.

data.name: LocationOrganizationIdInvalid
data.value: Organization id is invalid

data.name: LocationIdInvalid
data.value: Location id is invalid

data.name: DeleteLocationOrganizationNotFound
data.value: Organization was not found

data.name: DeleteLocationNotFound
data.value: Location was not found

data.name: LocationDeleteBlocked
data.value: Location cannot be deleted because assets, gateways or related records still depend on it

data.name: UnexpectedErrorCreatingLocation
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while creating the location.

data.name: LocationPlanLimitExceeded
data.value: Current subscription plan does not allow creating another location

data.name: UnexpectedErrorUpdatingLocation
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while updating the location.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorDeletingLocation
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while deleting the location.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorGettingLocations
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while getting locations.

data.name: InvalidGatewayRequest
data.value: The gateway request is invalid.

data.name: GatewayUuidDuplicated
data.value: Gateway UUID already exists in this organization.

data.name: GatewayNotFound
data.value: Gateway was not found.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorCreatingGateway
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while creating the gateway.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorUpdatingGateway
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while updating the gateway.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorGettingGateways
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while getting gateways.

data.name: GatewayDeleteBlocked
data.value: Gateway cannot be deleted because devices or related records still depend on it

data.name: UnexpectedErrorDeletingGateway
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while deleting the gateway.

data.name: InvalidAssetRequest
data.value: The asset request is invalid.

data.name: AssetOrganizationIdInvalid
data.value: Organization id is invalid

data.name: AssetIdInvalid
data.value: Asset id is invalid

data.name: AssetUuidDuplicated
data.value: Asset UUID already exists in this organization.

data.name: AssetNotFound
data.value: Asset was not found.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorCreatingAsset
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while creating the asset.

data.name: AssetPlanLimitExceeded
data.value: Current subscription plan does not allow creating another asset

data.name: UnexpectedErrorUpdatingAsset
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while updating the asset.

data.name: AssetDeleteOrganizationNotFound
data.value: Organization was not found

data.name: AssetDeleteNotFound
data.value: Asset was not found

data.name: AssetDeleteBlocked
data.value: Asset cannot be deleted because devices, readings, incidents or related records still depend on it

data.name: UnexpectedErrorDeletingAsset
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while deleting the asset.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorGettingAssets
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while getting assets.

data.name: InvalidIotDeviceRequest
data.value: The IoT device request is invalid.

data.name: IotDeviceUuidDuplicated
data.value: IoT device UUID already exists in this organization.

data.name: IotDeviceNotFound
data.value: IoT device was not found.

data.name: IotDeviceDeleteBlocked
data.value: IoT device cannot be deleted because readings or related records still depend on it

data.name: IotDeviceAssetLocationNotCompatible
data.value: The selected asset is not located at the same gateway location.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorCreatingIotDevice
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while creating the IoT device.

data.name: IotDevicePlanLimitExceeded
data.value: Current subscription plan does not allow creating another IoT device

data.name: UnexpectedErrorUpdatingIotDevice
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while updating the IoT device.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorDeletingIotDevice
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while deleting the IoT device.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorGettingIotDevices
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while getting IoT devices.

data.name: InvalidSensorReadingRequest
data.value: The sensor reading request is invalid.

data.name: SensorReadingNotFound
data.value: Sensor reading was not found.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorCreatingSensorReading
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while creating the sensor reading.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorGettingSensorReading
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while getting the sensor reading.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorGettingSensorReadings
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while getting sensor readings.

data.name: InvalidIncidentRequest
data.value: The incident request is invalid.

data.name: IncidentNotFound
data.value: Incident was not found.

data.name: IncidentAlreadyAcknowledged
data.value: Incident has already been acknowledged.

data.name: IncidentAlreadyResolved
data.value: Incident has already been resolved.

data.name: IncidentAlreadyEscalated
data.value: Incident has already been escalated.

data.name: InvalidIncidentLifecycleTransition
data.value: The incident lifecycle transition is not allowed.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorCreatingIncident
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while creating the incident.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorAcknowledgingIncident
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while acknowledging the incident.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorEscalatingIncident
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while escalating the incident.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorRegisteringIncidentCorrectiveAction
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while registering the incident corrective action.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorResolvingIncident
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while resolving the incident.

data.name: IncidentCannotReceiveAiResolutionPlan
data.value: Incident cannot receive AI resolution plans in its current status.

data.name: IncidentAiContextUnavailable
data.value: Incident context is incomplete or unavailable for AI resolution plan generation.

data.name: AiProviderUnavailable
data.value: AI provider is unavailable.

data.name: AiProviderDisabled
data.value: AI assistance is disabled.

data.name: AiProviderNotConfigured
data.value: AI provider is not configured.

data.name: AiProviderRequestFailed
data.value: AI provider request failed.

data.name: AiProviderTimeout
data.value: AI provider timed out.

data.name: AiProviderTimedOut
data.value: AI provider did not respond before the configured timeout.

data.name: InvalidAiStructuredOutput
data.value: Invalid AI structured output.

data.name: AiResolutionPlanInvalidStructuredOutput
data.value: AI provider returned an invalid resolution plan structure.

data.name: InvalidAiResolutionPlanApprovalRequest
data.value: The AI resolution plan approval request is invalid.

data.name: InvalidAiResolutionPlanRejectionRequest
data.value: The AI resolution plan rejection request is invalid.

data.name: AiResolutionPlanNotFound
data.value: The AI resolution plan was not found.

data.name: AiResolutionPlanAlreadyDecided
data.value: The AI resolution plan has already been approved or rejected.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorGeneratingAiResolutionPlan
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while generating the AI resolution plan.

data.name: AiResolutionPlanPlanLimitExceeded
data.value: Current subscription plan does not allow AI incident guidance

data.name: UnexpectedErrorApprovingAiResolutionPlan
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while approving the AI resolution plan.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorRejectingAiResolutionPlan
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while rejecting the AI resolution plan.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorGettingAiResolutionPlans
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while getting AI resolution plans.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorGettingIncidents
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while getting incidents.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorGettingNotifications
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while getting notifications.

data.name: InvalidReportRequest
data.value: The report request is invalid.

data.name: ReportNotFound
data.value: Report was not found.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorGeneratingReport
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while generating the report.

data.name: ReportPlanLimitExceeded
data.value: Current subscription plan does not allow generating reports

data.name: ReportAiSummaryContextUnavailable
data.value: Report context is incomplete or unavailable for AI summary generation.

data.name: ReportAiSummaryInvalidStructuredOutput
data.value: AI provider returned an invalid report summary structure.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorGeneratingReportAiSummary
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while generating the AI report summary.

data.name: ReportAiSummaryPlanLimitExceeded
data.value: Current subscription plan does not allow AI report summaries

data.name: UnexpectedErrorGettingReports
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while getting reports.

data.name: BillingOrganizationSubscriptionOrganizationNotFound
data.value: Organization was not found.

data.name: BillingOrganizationSubscriptionNotFound
data.value: Organization subscription was not found.

data.name: BillingOrganizationSubscriptionPlanNotFound
data.value: Subscription plan was not found.

data.name: BillingCheckoutSessionInvalidRequest
data.value: The checkout session request is invalid.

data.name: BillingCheckoutSessionOrganizationNotFound
data.value: Organization was not found.

data.name: BillingCheckoutSessionOrganizationSubscriptionNotFound
data.value: Organization subscription was not found.

data.name: BillingCheckoutSessionTargetPlanNotFound
data.value: Target plan was not found.

data.name: BillingCheckoutSessionFreePlanNotAllowed
data.value: The selected plan is free and does not require checkout.

data.name: BillingCheckoutSessionPlanProviderPriceNotConfigured
data.value: The selected plan does not have a Stripe price configured.

data.name: BillingCheckoutSessionProviderNotConfigured
data.value: Stripe checkout is not configured.

data.name: BillingCheckoutSessionProviderUnavailable
data.value: Stripe checkout is currently unavailable.

data.name: BillingPortalSessionInvalidRequest
data.value: The customer portal session request is invalid.

data.name: BillingPortalSessionOrganizationNotFound
data.value: Organization was not found.

data.name: BillingPortalSessionOrganizationSubscriptionNotFound
data.value: Organization subscription was not found.

data.name: BillingPortalSessionProviderCustomerNotFound
data.value: Organization does not have a Stripe customer yet.

data.name: BillingPortalSessionProviderNotConfigured
data.value: Stripe Customer Portal is not configured.

data.name: BillingPortalSessionProviderUnavailable
data.value: Stripe Customer Portal is currently unavailable.

data.name: BillingWebhookProviderNotConfigured
data.value: Stripe webhook signing secret is not configured.

data.name: BillingWebhookSignatureMissing
data.value: Stripe-Signature header is required.

data.name: BillingWebhookSignatureInvalid
data.value: Stripe webhook signature is invalid.

data.name: BillingWebhookPayloadInvalid
data.value: Stripe webhook payload is invalid.

data.name: BillingWebhookProcessingFailed
data.value: Stripe webhook could not be processed.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorGettingAssetSettings
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while getting asset settings.

data.name: InvalidMaintenanceScheduleRequest
data.value: The maintenance schedule request is invalid.

data.name: MaintenanceScheduleNotFound
data.value: Maintenance schedule was not found.

data.name: MaintenanceScheduleDuplicateActive
data.value: The asset already has an active maintenance schedule.

data.name: MaintenanceScheduleInvalidTransition
data.value: Maintenance schedule lifecycle transition is invalid.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorCreatingMaintenanceSchedule
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while creating the maintenance schedule.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorGettingMaintenanceSchedules
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while getting maintenance schedules.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorUpdatingMaintenanceSchedule
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while updating the maintenance schedule.

data.name: InvalidTechnicalServiceRequest
data.value: The technical service request is invalid.

data.name: TechnicalServiceRequestNotFound
data.value: Technical service request was not found.

data.name: TechnicalServiceRequestInvalidTransition
data.value: Technical service request lifecycle transition is invalid.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorCreatingTechnicalServiceRequest
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while creating the technical service request.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorGettingTechnicalServiceRequests
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while getting technical service requests.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorUpdatingTechnicalServiceRequest
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while updating the technical service request.

data.name: MaintenanceSchedulePlanLimitExceeded
data.value: Current subscription plan does not allow maintenance scheduling

data.name: TechnicalServiceRequestPlanLimitExceeded
data.value: Current subscription plan does not allow technical service requests

data.name: InvalidPasswordResetRequest
data.value: The password reset request is invalid.

data.name: PasswordResetRequestFailed
data.value: Password reset request could not be prepared.

data.name: InvalidDashboardAiInterpretationRequest
data.value: The dashboard AI interpretation request is invalid.

data.name: DashboardAiInterpretationContextUnavailable
data.value: Dashboard evidence could not be prepared for AI interpretation.

data.name: DashboardAiInterpretationInvalidStructuredOutput
data.value: The AI provider returned an invalid dashboard interpretation.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorGeneratingDashboardAiInterpretation
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while generating the dashboard AI interpretation.

data.name: DashboardAiInterpretationPlanLimitExceeded
data.value: Current subscription plan does not allow AI dashboard interpretation.
